metadata.title: Lindner IT – B2B IT Services & Web Design for Businesses in Berlin
metadata.description: Professional website development, IT support, networking and cybersecurity: B2B IT services for small and medium-sized businesses in Berlin — law firms, agencies, trades. Request a free quote today.

heroVideo.title: Reliable IT Solutions for SMEs
heroVideo.subtitle: Professional IT support, network setup, cybersecurity, and websites tailored for small and medium businesses

hero.subtitle: I provide professional IT support, secure network setup, cybersecurity, and high-quality websites for small and medium businesses.

background.title: My Background
background.text: I'm Markus Lindner, an IT specialist from Berlin and certified application developer (IHK Berlin). I combine system administration with software development: Windows servers, networks and Microsoft Azure on one side, modern websites built with TypeScript and React on the other. I grew up bilingual in German and Polish, speak fluent English and work with clients across many industries every day.

experience.title: My Experience
experience.text: I spent five years at Siemens AG in Berlin working hands-on with IT infrastructure, ELK-stack monitoring and automation using PowerShell and Python. Today I administer networks, servers and Microsoft 365 professionally and deliver freelance projects for small and medium-sized businesses: complete web platforms with Next.js and React, IT infrastructures for law firms and real estate agencies, cloud systems, data recovery and network installations — for example for Bullet Shop Berlin.

approach.title: My Approach
approach.text: Every project starts with a thorough analysis of your IT needs to identify risks and opportunities systematically. Based on that, I develop scalable solutions such as secure networks, professional websites and modern security measures — and implement them efficiently, focused on reliability and long-term stability. After go-live I stay on board with continuous support, consulting and optimization.

whyMe.title: Why Choose Me
whyMe.text: I work hands-on and solution-oriented. With recognized certifications in cybersecurity and data privacy, experience from both enterprise and small business environments, and a completed IHK vocational degree, I deliver secure, reliable and growth-driven IT solutions tailored to SMEs. Technical expertise meets clear client focus — so your IT doesn't just run, it runs sustainably, securely and efficiently.

elektro.title: Lindner Elektrotechnik

korff.title: Anwaltskanzlei Korff
korff.text: A trustworthy presence for criminal law and defence in Berlin: clear structure, a prominent emergency contact and confidence from the very first click.

phoenix.title: Survey tool for Haus Phönix
phoenix.text: Digital survey tool for the non-profit housing project's drug prevention work: anonymous, low-threshold and evaluated at the push of a button.

siemens.title: 5 years of enterprise experience: Siemens
siemens.text: As a working student at Siemens AG in Berlin: IT infrastructure, ELK-stack monitoring and automation with PowerShell and Python — enterprise quality that goes into every SME project today.

services.title: IT solutions that keep your business running

webDesign.title: Website Design & Hosting
webDesign.description: I create responsive, secure, and high-performing websites for your business that reflect your brand and attract customers.

faq1.question: How long does it take to build a website?
faq1.answer: Most business websites are completed within 4–6 weeks depending on complexity.

faq2.question: Do you offer website maintenance?
faq2.answer: Yes, I provide ongoing updates, backups, and security monitoring.

faq3.question: Can you redesign an existing website?
faq3.answer: Absolutely. I update designs, improve security, and optimize performance.

faq4.question: Do you provide e-commerce solutions?
faq4.answer: Yes, I can integrate online shops and payment gateways.

faq5.question: Will my website be mobile-friendly?
faq5.answer: Yes, all websites are fully responsive and optimized for mobile devices.

faq6.question: Can you help with website SEO?
faq6.answer: Yes, I provide on-page SEO optimization and performance improvements.

itSupport.title: IT Support for SMEs
itSupport.description: Reliable IT support for your company, including troubleshooting, hardware & software management, and user assistance.

faq1.question: Do you provide on-site support?
faq1.answer: Yes, I offer both on-site and remote IT support depending on your needs.

faq2.question: Can you manage our office computers?
faq2.answer: Yes, I handle all workstations, software installations, and updates.

faq3.question: Do you offer emergency support?
faq3.answer: Absolutely. I provide rapid response for urgent IT issues.

faq4.question: Do you provide IT training for employees?
faq4.answer: Yes, I can provide training to improve digital skills and security awareness.

faq5.question: Do you manage software licenses?
faq5.answer: Yes, I manage licenses, updates, and compliance for your business software.

faq6.question: Can you monitor our IT systems 24/7?
faq6.answer: Yes, I offer continuous monitoring and alerts for critical systems.

networkSetup.title: Network & Infrastructure
networkSetup.description: I design and implement secure and scalable networks, including wired and wireless setups, VPNs, and server architecture.

faq1.question: Do you set up office networks from scratch?
faq1.answer: Yes, I design and implement new networks tailored to your business size and needs.

faq2.question: Can you optimize an existing network?
faq2.answer: Absolutely. I can improve performance, security, and reliability.

faq3.question: Do you manage network security?
faq3.answer: Yes, I implement firewalls, access controls, and monitoring tools to keep your network safe.

faq4.question: Can you configure VPN access for remote employees?
faq4.answer: Yes, I provide secure VPN setups for remote work.

faq5.question: Do you provide network monitoring?
faq5.answer: Yes, I monitor network performance, uptime, and troubleshoot issues proactively.

faq6.question: Can you recommend hardware for our network?
faq6.answer: Yes, I provide advice and installation for routers, switches, and servers.

cyberSecurity.title: Cybersecurity
cyberSecurity.description: Protect your business with comprehensive cybersecurity services including risk assessment, threat prevention, and compliance.

faq1.question: How do you protect against cyber attacks?
faq1.answer: I implement firewalls, antivirus, regular updates, and monitoring to reduce risk.

faq2.question: Do you provide employee training?
faq2.answer: Yes, I offer cybersecurity awareness training to prevent human error.

faq3.question: Can you secure our cloud services?
faq3.answer: Absolutely. I secure cloud platforms and ensure compliance with best practices.

faq4.question: Do you provide penetration testing?
faq4.answer: Yes, I perform ethical hacking tests to identify vulnerabilities.

faq5.question: Can you help with GDPR compliance?
faq5.answer: Yes, I ensure your IT setup aligns with data protection regulations.

faq6.question: Do you offer continuous monitoring?
faq6.answer: Yes, I provide 24/7 monitoring for potential cyber threats.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: Reach out today to discuss your IT needs, request a quote, or arrange support tailored for your business.
contact.b2bNote: Please note: Lindner IT works exclusively with business clients — companies, self-employed professionals and organisations (B2B). I'm not the right contact for private computer repairs (B2C).

form.name: Name
form.successText: Thank you! I usually reply within 24 hours.
form.errorText: Please try again or email me directly at markuslindner1998@gmail.com.

reviews.name: Amin Karim
reviews.text: I had a website created by him including hardware, software, and full installation in my office. Everything went smoothly and I am absolutely satisfied. Highly recommended 👍

reviews.text: Very satisfied! The result was perfect, and he took time for me. Everything was very professional. Try it out—you have nothing to lose! Looking forward to next time!

reviews.name: Hassan

impressum.disclaimerText: Despite careful content control, we assume no liability for the content of external links. The operators of linked pages are solely responsible for their content. All information on this website is provided without guarantee.

datenschutz.title: Privacy Policy
datenschutz.dataCollectionText: When you visit this website, data is processed only to the following extent: (1) technical access data (e.g. IP address, time, page requested) by our hosting provider Vercel to deliver and secure the website; (2) Google Analytics for audience measurement — only if you have given consent via the cookie banner; IP addresses are anonymised; (3) contact form: the data you enter (name, email, phone, company, message) is sent to us directly by email and used solely to process your enquiry.
datenschutz.purposeText: Processing serves to provide and secure the website, to compile anonymised statistics (only with your consent) and to handle your enquiries. You can revoke your consent to Google Analytics at any time with future effect by deleting this site's cookies/site data in your browser and declining the banner again.
datenschutz.rightAccess: Right to access the personal data being processed
datenschutz.rightDeletion: Right to request deletion of personal data
